name: token-logo
title: Token Logo
description: Displays a token image with resilient symbol, name, or address fallback.
docs:
```tsx
import { TokenLogo } from "@/components/ui/token-logo"

<TokenLogo symbol="USDC" name="USD Coin" src="https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/6319/large/USD_Coin_icon.png" />
```
